title: My gut speaks. I am the one who listens.
subtitle: An affirmation for trusting the signal you already have
excerpt: For the moment when the sense is clear and the urge is to override it, second-guess it, or wait for external permission to trust it. A two-part statement for stepping into the knowing.

practice.whenToUse: When you have a clear gut sense about something and the second-guessing has started

content.text: The gut sense is often the first to know. The rationalisation, the waiting for more data, the checking what others think, all of that comes after. This affirmation is for the moment when the sense is already there and the work is choosing to act as the person who trusts it.
Say this three times, hand on stomach if that helps:
My gut speaks. I am the one who listens.
Then ask: what is the sense saying right now, before the second-guessing? Write it down in one sentence. That sentence is your starting position, not the one that gets revised.
